description_long: This chest of drawers features a robust, industrial design with a heavily weathered, rusted metal exterior. The surface is mottled with brown and dark gray patches, indicating significant oxidation and exposure to the elements. Reinforcing metal bands run vertically and horizontally along the front and sides, adding structural integrity and a utilitarian aesthetic. The chest has three large drawers, each outlined by the metal bands, but no visible handles or locks are present. The top is slightly curved, further emphasizing its rugged, functional style. This piece would be well-suited for use in urban garages, workshops, or outdoor storage areas.
description: A heavily rusted, industrial metal chest of drawers with three large drawers and reinforced bands, lacking visible handles or locks.
description_view_0: The end view shows the curved, rusted metal surface with visible rivets and no drawer details.
description_view_1: The front view displays three large drawers outlined by metal bands, with a weathered, rusty finish and no visible handles.
description_view_2: The opposite end view mirrors view 0, showing the curved, rusted metal surface with rivets and no drawer details.
description_view_3: The rear or alternate side view is similar to the front but lacks drawer outlines, showing only the weathered metal surface and reinforcing bands.
